spec.name: Behind The Inn
spec.description: You now stand behind the Inn. The smell here is not so pleasant as the keeper and his help throw a good deal of garbage here. A couple of piles of rubbish are to the west, but you will smell the worse for meddling there. As a clean alternative, you can go north or east around the Inn.

east.description: You can go around the Inn this way.

west.description: Only rats and fool adventurers play in garbage.
